Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class Wires

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.Wires
All Implemented Interfaces:

    • cancelWireWithdrawal

      public WireWithdrawalsCancelWireWithdrawalResponse cancelWireWithdrawal(String accountId, String wireWithdrawalId, CancelWireWithdrawalRequestCreate cancelWireWithdrawalRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Cancel Wire Withdrawal Cancels an existing wire withdrawal
      Specified by:
      cancelWireWithdrawal in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallWireWithdrawalsCancelWireWithdrawal
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      wireWithdrawalId - The wireWithdrawal id.
      cancelWireWithdrawalRequestCreate - Request to cancel an existing wire withdrawal. The cancel will only succeed if the wire has not made it to the SendingToBank state
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
